drowning:
🚨 DROWNING EMERGENCY

CALL 101 (Fire Department) or 1070 (Disaster Management) IMMEDIATELY

Actions to take:
1. If safe, throw a rope or branch to the person
2. DO NOT jump in if you can't swim
3. Call for help immediately
4. Get professional rescue assistance

Never go into water to save someone unless trained in water rescue.
electrocution:
🚨 ELECTRICAL EMERGENCY

CALL 102 (Ambulance) IMMEDIATELY

Actions to take:
1. DO NOT touch the person with your bare hands
2. Turn off the power source if it's safe to do so
3. Move the person away from the electrical source
4. If unconscious, perform CPR if trained
5. Keep the person warm while waiting for ambulance
fire:
🚨 FIRE EMERGENCY

CALL 101 (Fire Department) IMMEDIATELY

Actions to take:
1. Alert everyone - EVACUATE IMMEDIATELY
2. Use stairs - NEVER use elevators
3. Go to a safe assembly point away from building
4. Close doors behind you to slow fire spread
5. Do NOT go back inside for belongings

Your life is more important than any possession.
snake_bite:
🚨 SNAKE BITE EMERGENCY

CALL 102 (Ambulance) IMMEDIATELY

Actions to take:
1. Stay calm - panic speeds up venom absorption
2. Keep the bitten limb immobilized and below heart level
3. Wash the bite with soap and water
4. DO NOT try to catch or kill the snake
5. DO NOT apply a tourniquet or try to suck venom
6. Go to hospital immediately - anti-venom needed
childbirth:
🚨 CHILDBIRTH EMERGENCY

CALL 102 (Ambulance) IMMEDIATELY

GO TO THE NEAREST HOSPITAL - DO NOT DELAY

This is a medical emergency requiring professional help.
Do not attempt home delivery in emergency situations.

Call ambulance immediately and go to the hospital.
heart_attack:
🚨 HEART ATTACK EMERGENCY

CALL 102 (Ambulance) IMMEDIATELY

Actions to take:
1. Have the person stop all activity immediately
2. Make them sit or lie down
3. If available, give aspirin - chew it
4. Loosen tight clothing
5. If unconscious and not breathing, perform CPR if trained
6. Keep the person warm and calm

Heart attacks need emergency medical care - minutes matter.
